name: Merge queue branch name hides the real PR branch
query: Our merge queue run seems to compare against the wrong branch.
context: The branch name matches a GitHub merge queue pattern and the customer expects Chromatic to reason about the original pull request branch instead.
expected_behavior: Chooses `WF_MERGE_QUEUE_BRANCH_REMAP` or explains that branch remapping is the decisive factor
Explains merge queue branch naming in public-safe language
Requests at most one confirming artifact if needed
success_criteria: The response does not misclassify the issue as a generic shallow-history problem
The response explains the branch-name translation clearly
